Body.Content:
Microsoft Teams Rooms on Windows can now join town halls, webinars, and structured meetings in Teams as attendees. You can attend directly from the invited Teams Room, with the same features that attendees have for all events. Available in Teams Rooms Pro.

GA date: May CY2025

Details.Value: Microsoft Teams Rooms on Windows can now join town halls, webinars, and structured meetings in Teams as attendees. You can attend directly from the invited Teams Room, with the same features that attendees have for all events. Available in Teams Rooms Pro.

Details.Name: CloudInstances
Details.Value: DoD, GCC, GCC High, Worldwide (Standard Multi-Tenant)

message.Title: Microsoft Teams: Join as attendees in Microsoft town hall and webinars from Teams Rooms on Windows
